title: Subitem Bar Freeze
excerpt: Can we please freeze the subitem bar? When I scroll down many subitems, You can’t see the title of the subitem board anymore.

posts.author: ElizabethMonday (Elizabeth Sway)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we please freeze the subitem bar? When I scroll down many subitems, You can’t see the title of the subitem board anymore.
